variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 10769 K Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 10769 K Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 10769 K is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF819KM Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10769 K
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF819KM axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
